name: python3-babel
title: python3-babel
summary: tools for internationalizing Python applications - Python 3.x
description:
tools for internationalizing Python applications - Python 3.x
Babel is composed of two major parts. First tools to build and work with
gettext message catalogs. Second a Python interface to the CLDR (Common
Locale Data Repository), providing access to various locale display
names, localized number and date formatting, etc.
.
This package provides the Python 3.x module.

arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for pybabel-python3.
arguments.raw: -python3  Option present in package usage line for pybabel-python3.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use pybabel-python3 because tools for internationalizing Python applications - Python 3.x.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use pybabel-python3 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `pybabel-python3 [options] [args]` as documented upstream for pybabel-python3.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair pybabel-python3 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `pybabel-python3 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
